purpose: Prevent Shopify storefront prices from being multiplied or divided by 100 through ambiguous unit inference.

catalog_products_json_decimal.accepted_shape: nonnegative decimal major-unit amount with no more than two fractional digits

admin_graphql_decimal.endpoint_pattern: Shopify Admin GraphQL Money or MoneyV2 amount
admin_graphql_decimal.accepted_shape: nonnegative decimal major-unit amount with no more than two fractional digits

prohibited_logic: Do not infer cents from whether a value is numeric.
Do not infer cents from whether a string contains only digits.
Do not infer units from amount magnitude.
Do not strip a decimal point and then format the remaining digits as dollars.
Do not divide decimal Shopify values by 100.
Do not treat integer-cent Shopify values as major currency units.
live_product_scope: Every MMG product page or catalog carousel that formats Shopify money
release_gates: All required regression values pass for explicit cents sources.
All required regression values pass for explicit decimal sources.
Malformed or ambiguous values fail closed to the configured fallback.
Live product variant prices remain unchanged.
The Professional tier renders $397.95 on mobile and desktop.
AI Image Mastery renders $9.95 on mobile and desktop.
Cart and checkout use the matching Shopify variant price.
